title: Peace.
content:
Unbroken peace, I ween, is sweeter far
         Than reconciliation. Love's red scar,
        Though salved with kiss of penitence, and tears,
         Remains, full oft, unhealed through all the years.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jean Blewett, titled "Peace.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
